Accessibility / Helpers / NVDA / nvda-helper / nvda-helper-popover

Run Accessibility / Helpers / NVDA / nvda-helper / nvda-helper-popover

Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:%21function()%7B%22use%20strict%22%3Bfunction%20t()%7Be.remove()%2Co.remove()%2Cdocument.removeEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Cn)%7Dfunction%20n(t)%7Bo.matches(%22%3Apopover-open%22)%26%26%22Escape%22%3D%3D%3Dt.key%26%26o.hidePopover()%7Dwindow.__nvdaPopoverCleanup%26%26window.__nvdaPopoverCleanup()%3Blet%20e%3Ddocument.createElement(%22button%22)%3Be.id%3D%22nvda-helper-popover-btn%22%2Ce.type%3D%22button%22%2Ce.textContent%3D%22NVDA%20Helper%22%2Ce.setAttribute(%22popovertarget%22%2C%22nvda-helper-popover%22)%2Ce.style.cssText%3D%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctposition%3Afixed%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctbottom%3A1em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctright%3A1em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctz-index%3A10001%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctborder-radius%3A1.5em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctborder%3Anone%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctbackground%3A%23155b2a%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctcolor%3A%23fff%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctpadding%3A.7em%201.5em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctbox-shadow%3A0%202px%208px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C.2)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctfont-family%3Ainherit%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctfont-size%3A1.1em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctcursor%3Apointer%3B%5Cn%5Ct%22%3Blet%20o%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bo.id%3D%22nvda-helper-popover%22%2Co.setAttribute(%22popover%22%2C%22%22)%2Co.style.cssText%3D%22%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23888%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctborder-radius%3A.5rem%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctpadding%3A1em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctbackground%3A%23fff%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctbox-shadow%3A0%202px%208px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.2)%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctcolor%3A%23333%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctfont-family%3A-apple-system%2CBlinkMacSystemFont%2C%27Segoe%20UI%27%2CRoboto%2CArial%2Csans-serif%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctfont-size%3A.9em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctline-height%3A1.2em%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctmargin%3A0%20auto%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctmax-height%3A95vh%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctoverflow-y%3Aauto%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctwidth%3A43rem%3B%5Cn%5Ct%5Ctz-index%3A10002%3B%5Cn%5Ct%22%2Co.innerHTML%3D%27%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cstyle%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20table%20%7Bborder-collapse%3Acollapse%3Bwidth%3A100%25%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20td%2C%20%23nvda-helper-popover%20th%20%7Bpadding%3A8px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23ddd%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20td%3Anth-child(2)%20%7Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20tr%3Anth-child(odd)%20%7Bbackground%3A%23eee%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20tr%3Anth-child(even)%20%7Bbackground%3A%23fff%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-popover%20a%20%7Btext-decoration%3Aunderline%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%23nvda-helper-close%20%7Bfloat%3Aright%3Bfont-size%3A1.3em%3Bpadding%3A.2em%20.8em%3Bmargin%3A0%20auto%20auto%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3B%7D%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fstyle%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22popover-container%22%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Cbutton%20id%3D%22nvda-helper-close%22%20popovertarget%3D%22nvda-helper-popover%22%20popovertargetaction%3D%22hide%22%20aria-label%3D%22Close%22%3E%26times%3B%3C%2Fbutton%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ch1%3ENVDA%20Guide%3C%2Fh1%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Cp%3EThe%20default%20NVDA%20key%20is%20%3Cstrong%3ECtrl%20%2B%20Alt%20%2B%20N%3C%2Fstrong%3E%20or%20%3Cstrong%3EInsert%3C%2Fstrong%3E.%3C%2Fp%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctable%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Cth%3ETask%3C%2Fth%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Cth%3ECommand%3C%2Fth%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3ETurn%20%3Cstrong%3ENVDA%20on%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EControl%20%2B%20Alt%20%2B%20N%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3ETurn%20%3Cstrong%3ENVDA%20off%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ENVDA%20key%20%2B%20Q%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3EStop%20Reading%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EControl%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3EStart%20reading%3C%2Fstrong%3E%20continuously%20from%20this%20point%20on%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EInsert%20%2B%20%5Cu25bc%20or%20Numpad%20Plus%20(%2B)%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3ERead%20next%20item%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3E%5Cu25bc%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3ERead%20next%20focusable%20item%3C%2Fstrong%3E%20(e.g.%20link%2C%20button)%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ETab%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3EActivate%20link%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EEnter%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3EActivate%20button%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EEnter%20or%20Spacebar%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20heading%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EH%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20heading%20of%20level%20%5B1-6%5D%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3E1%20-%206%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EList%20%3Cstrong%3Eall%20headings%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ENVDA%20key%20%2B%20F7%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20landmark%2Fregion%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ED%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EShow%20list%20of%20%3Cstrong%3Eall%20links%2C%20headings%2C%20form%20fields%2C%20buttons%2C%20and%20landmarks%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ENVDA%20key%20%2B%20F7%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20the%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20table%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ET%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3ENavigate%20%3Cstrong%3Etable%20cells%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ECtrl%20%2B%20Alt%20%2B%20%5Cu25bc%20or%20%5Cu25b2%20or%20%5Cu25c0%5Cufe0e%20or%20%5Cu25b6%5Cufe0e%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20the%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20list%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EL%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20the%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20list%20item%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EI%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20the%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20graphic%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EG%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EList%20%3Cstrong%3Eall%20links%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3ENVDA%20key%20%2B%20F7%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20the%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20link%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EK%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20unvisited%20link%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EU%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3EGo%20to%20%3Cstrong%3Enext%20visited%20link%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EV%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3E%3Cstrong%3EToggle%3C%2Fstrong%3E%20between%3A%20Radio%20buttons%2C%20%26lt%3Bselect%26gt%3Blist%20items%2C%20Tabs%20(ARIA%20widget)%2C%20Tree%20view%20items%20(ARIA%20widget)%2C%20Menu%20items%20(ARIA%20widget)%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3E%5Cu25b6%5Cufe0e%20or%20%5Cu25bc%20or%20%5Cu25c0%5Cufe0e%20or%20%5Cu25b2%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Ctr%3E%3Ctd%3ETo%20%3Cstrong%3Eprevious%20heading%2C%20landmark%2C%20table%2C%20focusable%20item%2C%20etc.%3C%2Fstrong%3E%3C%2Ftd%3E%3Ctd%3EShift%20%2B%20%5BH%2C%20D%2C%20T%2C%20Tab%2C%20etc.%5D%3C%2Ftd%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Ftable%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%5Ct%3Cp%3EFor%20more%20shortcuts%2C%20visit%20%3Ca%20href%3D%22https%3A%2F%2Fdequeuniversity.com%2Fscreenreaders%2Fnvda-keyboard-shortcuts%22%20target%3D%22_blank%22%3EDeque%20University%3C%2Fa%3E.%3C%2Fp%3E%5Cn%5Ct%5Ct%3C%2Fdiv%3E%5Cn%5Ct%27%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(e)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(o)%2Cwindow.__nvdaPopoverCleanup%3Dt%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22keydown%22%2Cn)%2Co.addEventListener(%22close%22%2Ct)%7D()%3B
